title: Packet 046 And Packet 047 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the local Packet 046 closure authority and Packet 047 planning authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting commit without treating authority publication as migration approval or execution authority.
active_role: Olares Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 047 selected one later bounded relay search criteria reset source/test candidate, but kept execution closed and selected authority publication plus host-mirror resync as the next move before any later host-side source/test packet.
required_inputs: Current Packet 046 closure handoff and Packet 046 JSON completion state
Current Packet 047 planning handoff and Packet 047 JSON completion state
Current Packet 048 draft, routing handoff, and roadmap updates
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness
Current `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit and push containing only Packet 046 closure authority, Packet 047 closure authority, Packet 048 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates needed for this gate

A host mirror resync record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit without force/reset/clean, remote rewrite, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, install, source edits, or old-clone mutation
A publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, excluded drift, and the next decision candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 046/047 closure authority from unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Reconfirm source files, package files, and lockfiles remain clean and outside the publication scope.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at `35d808ae3ef359e4e75544ddbd81ee2f8e3cef9e` before publication.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 046 closure authority, Packet 047 planning authority, Packet 048 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit only if it can be done non-destructively.

Do not force, reset, clean, rewrite remotes, mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`, install dependencies, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, approve migration, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, edit source, or open another execution trial.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and non-destructive `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror resync.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 048 published Packet 046 closure authority, Packet 047 planning authority, Packet 048 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates in commit `f16ad796b987c1cf42124a5a58888822185896f3`, pushed to `origin/clean-main`, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from `35d808ae3ef359e4e75544ddbd81ee2f8e3cef9e` to clean parity at `f16ad796b987c1cf42124a5a58888822185896f3`. It excluded `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift, did not rewrite the moved remote, did not edit source, did not mutate runtime, services, packages, lockfiles, AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, canonical-hosting, or `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
next_action: Open only Packet 049 as a decision-only post-048 relay search reset trial authorization pass. Do not treat Packet 048 as execution authority, migration approval, generic Olares reopening, runtime authority, service authority, package authority, AI-services authority, Gitea/code-hosting authority, canonical-hosting authority, remote rewrite authority, force/reset/clean authority, or old-clone mutation authority.
